bar_values.description: Vertical bar graph appears. Color data from warmup. Red=40, Blue=30, Green=50, Yellow=20. Axis labeled 0–60 in 10s. Red bar highlighted with axis line at 40 glowing.
Vertical bar graph appears. Favorite Colors data from Warmup. Red=40, Blue=30, Green=50, Yellow=20. Axis labeled 0 to 60 in intervals of 10. All 4 bars pre-filled.

params.description: Horizontal guideline draws from top of Red bar to vertical axis at 40. The 40 mark on the axis glows.

params.text: You saw this bar graph in Warmup. Now let's learn how to read it exactly.

elements.description: Vertical bar graph. Color data. Red bar highlighted with axis line at 40 glowing. Axis labeled 0–60 in 10s.
Vertical bar graph. Favorite Colors data. Red bar highlighted with guideline to axis at 40. Axis labeled 0–60 in 10s.

params.description: Axis numbers 10, 20, 30, 40, 50, 60 highlight sequentially from bottom to top.
Axis labels 10, 20, 30, 40, 50, 60 highlight sequentially from bottom to top.

beats.text: See these numbers along the side? They show the scale—10, 20, 30, 40... That's counting by 10s!
See these numbers along the side? They show the scale. 10, 20, 30, 40. That's counting by 10s!

elements.description: Vertical bar graph. Color data. Red bar highlighted. Axis numbers highlighted, showing scale of 10.
Vertical bar graph. Red bar highlighted with guideline to axis at 40. Axis labels highlighted showing scale of 10.

params.description: Horizontal line draws from top of Red bar to vertical axis at 40.

beats.text: Red has 40. The HEIGHT OF THE BAR ends at the 40 line.
Red has 40. The height of the bar ends at the 40 line.

elements.description: Vertical bar graph. Color data. Red bar highlighted. Guideline drawn from top of Red bar to axis at 40.
Vertical bar graph. Red bar highlighted with guideline to axis at 40.

params.description: Axis labels highlight sequentially: 10, 20, 30, 40 pulse in sequence to demonstrate counting by 10s.
Axis labels 10, 20, 30, 40 pulse sequentially as counting animation plays.

text: I can count by 10s to check: 10, 20, 30, 40. You already know how to count by 10s!

elements.description: Vertical bar graph. Color data. Red bar highlighted. Axis labels 10, 20, 30, 40 highlighted, showing counting sequence.
Vertical bar graph. Red bar highlighted at 40. Counting animation complete.
